reply_original: Glad you are enjoying the experience! We are thrilled to have you in the Fantasia world. If you ever have ideas to make it even cooler or run into any issues, feel free to reach out to us at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun chatting with your favorite characters!
reply_zh: 很高兴你喜欢这次体验！我们非常激动你能加入 Fantasia 的世界。如果你有任何能让它变得更酷的想法，或者遇到任何问题，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝你与心仪的角色聊得开心！
